NCT01807923.name: TRAFFIC
NCT01807923.group: Lumacaftor 400 mg + Ivacaftor 250 mg PO BID | CFTR corrector + potentiator (F508del/F508del CF; vs Placebo; TRAFFIC 24 wk ppFEV1)

allOutcomes.title: Absolute change in ppFEV1 at wk 24 lumacaftor/ivacaftor vs placebo (TRAFFIC co-primary; MD)
Pulmonary exacerbation rate ratio at wk 24 lumacaftor/ivacaftor vs placebo (TRAFFIC; rate ratio from negative-binomial regression, LUM 400/IVA arm)
allOutcomes.source: CT.gov NCT01807923 outcomeMeasures (rate ratio 0.6643, 95% CI 0.4749-0.9291, p=0.0169)

NCT01807923.snippet: Wainwright CE et al. NEJM 2015;373:220-231 (TRAFFIC + TRANSPORT). First CFTR modulator combination for F508del/F508del. Approved as Orkambi 2015.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Confirmed diagnosis of CF~* Homozygous for the F508del CFTR mutation~* Forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) greater than or equal to (>=) 40 percent (%) and less than or equal to (=<) 90% of predicted normal for age, sex, and height~* Willing to remain on a stable CF medication regimen through Week 24 or, if applicable, the Safety Follow up Visit~Exclusion Criteria:~* An acute upper or lower respiratory infection, pulmonary exacerbation, or changes in therapy (inc...

NCT02347657.name: EVOLVE
NCT02347657.group: Tezacaftor 100 mg + Ivacaftor 150 mg PO (AM tez+iva, PM iva) | Next-gen corrector + potentiator (F508del/F508del CF; vs Placebo; EVOLVE 24 wk ppFEV1)

allOutcomes.title: Absolute change in ppFEV1 at wk 24 tezacaftor/ivacaftor vs placebo (EVOLVE primary; MD)
Pulmonary exacerbation rate ratio at wk 24 tezacaftor/ivacaftor vs placebo (EVOLVE; rate ratio from negative-binomial regression)
allOutcomes.source: CT.gov NCT02347657 outcomeMeasures (rate ratio 0.65, 95% CI 0.48-0.88, p=0.0054)

NCT02347657.snippet: Taylor-Cousar JL et al. NEJM 2017;377:2013-2023 (EVOLVE). Better tolerability than lumacaftor; approved as Symdeko 2018.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Homozygous for the F508del CFTR mutation, genotype to be confirmed at the Screening Visit~* Confirmed diagnosis of CF defined as a sweat chloride value ≥60 mmol/L by quantitative pilocarpine iontophoresis~* Forced expiratory volume at one second (FEV1) ≥40% and ≤90% of predicted normal for age, sex, and height during screening~* Stable CF disease as judged by the investigator~* Willing to remain on a stable CF medication regimen through Week 24 or, if applicable, the Safet...

NCT03525444.name: VX18-445-102
NCT03525444.group: Elexacaftor 200 mg + Tezacaftor 100 mg + Ivacaftor 150 mg PO | Triple therapy (F508del/MF CF; vs Placebo; VX18-445-102 24 wk ppFEV1)

allOutcomes.title: Absolute change in ppFEV1 at wk 24 elexacaftor/tezacaftor/ivacaftor vs placebo (VX18-445-102 primary; F/MF population; MD)
Pulmonary exacerbation rate ratio at wk 24 elexacaftor/tezacaftor/ivacaftor vs placebo (VX18-445-102; F/MF population)
allOutcomes.source: CT.gov NCT03525444 outcomeMeasures (rate ratio 0.37, 95% CI 0.25-0.55, p<0.0001)

NCT03525444.snippet: Middleton PG et al. NEJM 2019;381:1809-1819 (VX18-445-102). Practice-changing: ppFEV1 gain of 13.8% vastly exceeds prior modulators. Approved as Trikafta 2019; revolutionised CF care.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 12 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria:~* Heterozygous for the F508del mutation (F/MF)~* Forced expiratory volume in 1 second (FEV1) value ≥40% and ≤90% of predicted mean for age, sex, and height~Key Exclusion Criteria:~* Clinically significant cirrhosis with or without portal hypertension~* Lung infection with organisms associated with a more rapid decline in pulmonary status~* Solid organ or hematological transplantation~Other protocol defined Inclusion/Exclusion criteria may apply"

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: Percent predicted forced expiratory volume in 1 second (ppFEV1) — absolute change from baseline at week 24 (MD)
NMA_CONFIG.note: k=3 Pbo-anchored pivotal Phase 3 trials; star through Placebo. Each trial enrolled F508del/F508del (or F/MF for ETI) population. Background airway clearance therapy continued in all arms. All effect sizes at wk 24.

title: RapidMeta Respiratory | CFTR Modulator Ladder in Cystic Fibrosis NMA v1.0
